history.title: In Praise of Lofting
history.description: "In Praise of Lofting Over the last twenty years I've taught various sorts of boat building workshops at crafts schools and museums, and one workshop that has never failed to attract attention is lofting. I begin each class by asking students if they have read any books or articles on lofting. All h
